name: wb-indicator

expect.error: indicator required (WB code like 'SP.POP.TOTL' or alias like 'population')
indicator must be a World Bank code or alias (alphanumeric, dot/dash/underscore)

_note: Fetches one World Bank indicator series for a country from data.worldbank.org. Every fuzz_case lands on a PRE-NETWORK validation branch so NO outbound call is made (deterministic, never hammers the upstream): a malformed/absent ISO-3 country fails-closed, then a missing indicator, then a non-code indicator (the XSS probe is blocked by the format guard BEFORE the value is interpolated into the WB URL path — genuine URL-injection hardening). A real {country:'USA', indicator:'SP.POP.TOTL'} would proceed to fetch (not exercised here). NEVER no_db (no DB involved).
